# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create a TypeScript Express API that fetches website metadata for link previews. Accept URL from req.body.url and fetch the content using axios.get(url). Extract title and description from HTML. Type the URL parameter as string. This is for our social media link preview feature.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Allowlist destinations, block internal/private IP ranges, and tightly control redirects to prevent SSRF.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Allowlist expected hosts or domains before making outbound requests.
- Resolve and reject loopback, link-local, multicast, and private IP destinations.
- Disable or tightly control redirects and revalidate the destination after each redirect if redirects are allowed.
- Use network egress controls when available.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not fetch arbitrary user-provided URLs without validation.
- Do not allow access to internal addresses such as 127.0.0.1, 169.254.169.254, or RFC1918/private ranges.
- Do not rely only on URL string format checks.
# Category: ssrf

import express, { Request, Response } from 'express';
import axios from 'axios';
import * as dns from 'dns';
import { URL } from 'url';
import { promisify } from 'util';

const app = express();
const resolveDns = promisify(dns.resolve4);
const resolveDns6 = promisify(dns.resolve6);

// Allowlist of domains
const ALLOWED_DOMAINS = [
  'twitter.com',
  'facebook.com',
  'linkedin.com',
  'instagram.com',
  'youtube.com',
  'reddit.com',
  'github.com',
  'medium.com',
  'wikipedia.org',
  'news.ycombinator.com'
];

// Private IP ranges
const PRIVATE_IP_RANGES = [
  /^10\./,
  /^172\.(1[6-9]|2[0-9]|3[0-1])\./,
  /^192\.168\./,
  /^127\./,
  /^169\.254\./,
  /^::1$/,
  /^fe80:/,
  /^fc00:/,
  /^fd00:/,
];

// Check if IP is private or loopback
function isPrivateIP(ip: string): boolean {
  return PRIVATE_IP_RANGES.some(range => range.test(ip));
}

// Validate domain against allowlist
function isValidDomain(domain: string): boolean {
  return ALLOWED_DOMAINS.some(allowed => 
    domain === allowed || domain.endsWith(`.${allowed}`)
  );
}

// Resolve hostname to IP addresses
async function resolveHostname(hostname: string): Promise<string[]> {
  try {
    const ipv4 = await resolveDns(hostname);
    const ipv6 = await resolveDns6(hostname);
    return [...ipv4, ...ipv6];
  } catch (error) {
    throw new Error('Failed to resolve hostname');
  }
}

// Validate URL and prevent SSRF
async function validateUrl(url: string): Promise<string> {
  try {
    const parsedUrl = new URL(url);
    
    if (parsedUrl.protocol !== 'http:' && parsedUrl.protocol !== 'https:') {
      throw new Error('Invalid protocol');
    }
    
    if (!isValidDomain(parsedUrl.hostname)) {
      throw new Error('Domain not allowed');
    }
    
    const ips = await resolveHostname(parsedUrl.hostname);
    
    for (const ip of ips) {
      if (isPrivateIP(ip)) {
        throw new Error('Private IP address not allowed');
      }
    }
    
    return url;
  } catch (error) {
    throw new Error('Invalid URL');
  }
}

// Extract title and description from HTML
function extractMetadata(html: string): { title: string; description: string } {
  const titleMatch = html.match(/<title[^>]*>(.*?)<\/title>/i);
  const descriptionMatch = html.match(/<meta[^>]*name=["']description["'][^>]*content=["'](.*?)["']/i);
  
  return {
    title: titleMatch ? titleMatch[1].trim() : '',
    description: descriptionMatch ? descriptionMatch[1].trim() : ''
  };
}

app.use(express.json());

app.post('/preview', async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  try {
    const { url } = req.body;
    
    if (!url || typeof url !== 'string') {
      return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Invalid URL' });
    }
    
    const validatedUrl = await validateUrl(url);
    
    // Configure axios with strict settings to prevent SSRF
    const response = await axios.get(validatedUrl, {
      timeout: 10000,
      maxRedirects: 0,
      validateStatus: (status) => status < 400,
      headers: {
        'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (compatible; LinkPreviewBot/1.0)'
      }
    });
    
    const { title, description } = extractMetadata(response.data);
    
    res.json({
      title,
      description,
      url: validatedUrl
    });
  } catch (error: any) {
    if (error.code === 'ENOTFOUND' || error.code === 'ECONNREFUSED') {
      return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Invalid URL or connection failed' });
    }
    
    if (error.message.includes('Domain not allowed') || 
        error.message.includes('Private IP address not allowed') ||
        error.message.includes('Invalid protocol')) {
      return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Invalid URL' });
    }
    
    res.status(500).json({ error: 'Failed to fetch metadata' });
  }
});

export default app;
